text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem service-provision-conditions

Profile: https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/complete-code-system-4

Properties

This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

NameCodeURITypeDescription
statusstatushttp://hl7.org/fhir/concept-properties#statuscodeA property that indicates the status of the concept. One of active, experimental, deprecated, retired
deprecationDatedeprecationDatehttp://hl7.org/fhir/concept-properties#deprecationDatedateTimeThe date at which a concept was deprecated. Concepts that are deprecated but not inactive can still be used, but their use is discouraged

Concepts

This case-sensitive code system http://terminology.hl7.org.au/CodeSystem/service-provision-conditions defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinitionDeprecatedstatusdeprecationDate
NFE No FeeA free service where no payment or Medicare card is required.
NFM No Fee (means tested)All or some of the services provided are offered free of charge, however the decision on the costs associated with the service or procedures offered will depend on a means test outcome.
BB Bulk BillingNo fee for eligible services, with a Medicare card presented.
FAP Fees ApplyFees apply for services provided.
DON By DonationAll or some of the services provided are offered on a donation basis. The expectation on the donation is not defined.
COP Co-paymentAll or some of the services provided are subject to a co-payment, which may be in combination with private insurance.
MIX Mixed BillingBulk billing available with conditions, fees may apply.
BBO Bulk Billing OnlyBulk Billing is offered under Medicare. ***Deprecation Comment:*** This code has been deprecated as it has been replaced by BB - Bulk Billing.Deprecateddeprecated2026-05-20
FBB Fees and Bulk BillingAll or some of the services provided are offered subject to a payment in combination with Bulk Billing. ***Deprecation Comment:*** This code has been deprecated as it has been replaced by MIX - Mixed Billing.Deprecateddeprecated2026-05-20

name: ServiceProvisionConditionsAustralianConcepts
title: Service Provision Conditions Australian Concepts
description: The Service Provision Conditions Australian Concepts code system defines concepts that identify the conditions under which a healthcare service is available/offered.

property.description: A property that indicates the status of the concept. One of active, experimental, deprecated, retired
The date at which a concept was deprecated. Concepts that are deprecated but not inactive can still be used, but their use is discouraged

concept.definition: A free service where no payment or Medicare card is required.
All or some of the services provided are offered free of charge, however the decision on the costs associated with the service or procedures offered will depend on a means test outcome.
No fee for eligible services, with a Medicare card presented.
All or some of the services provided are offered on a donation basis. The expectation on the donation is not defined.
All or some of the services provided are subject to a co-payment, which may be in combination with private insurance.
Bulk billing available with conditions, fees may apply.
Bulk Billing is offered under Medicare. ***Deprecation Comment:*** This code has been deprecated as it has been replaced by BB - Bulk Billing.

All or some of the services provided are offered subject to a payment in combination with Bulk Billing. ***Deprecation Comment:*** This code has been deprecated as it has been replaced by MIX - Mixed Billing.
